name: Southern Copper Corporation
content: Southern Copper Corporation is one of the largest integrated copper producers in the world, primarily operating in Peru and Mexico. A subsidiary of Grupo México, the company focuses on the exploration, smelting, and refining of copper and other minerals. It maintains some of the world's largest copper reserves and is a significant producer of molybdenum, silver, and zinc. With a history of low-cost production and extensive mining operations, Southern Copper plays a critical role in the global supply chain for industrial and precious metals.
